{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315415361A0A00C17D65D867591"}"},"total":8},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7619200814214152985","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"做为一个小白文整体感觉还是挺好的，节奏舒缓，设定新颖。
不过剧情推进缓慢（相较于其他同行的书来说），给人感觉有些拖沓。当然也可以看做是作者的一种写作特色，可以适量简化非主线剧情，在不改变原有的写作风格与特色下。保持好自己的特点，稍微学习优秀前辈的写作方法。
总之这本书有完结的可能。能不能火我就不知道了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773987983,"group_id":"7611010666932997182","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个无聊的人呢","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4I5YKWh+gV9mmImvJHAWzY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d880d8bce2824f71a7c71642337f05c8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790799&x-signature=YwlN8%2BmaJYDKVc%2FeQzEmSDqPcf8%3D","user_id":"460049168733629","user_name":"我是东晨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"460049168733629","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7611010666932997182","book_info":{"abstract":"【荒野求生+手搓后宫+升级打怪+角色养成+悠闲种田+秘境穿梭】
母星被吃，全人类被迫无限求生，还好母星技高一筹，让全人类觉醒天赋，踏上拯救自己的道路。
唐枢仁幸运的觉醒了天赋『熔炉』，只要投入各种标签，便能制造任何产物。
对他来说！各种游戏动漫中的装备、道具乃至角色，似乎都已经唾手可得。
那么该如何获得标签呢？面对来袭的部落野人、腐化怪物……
唐枢仁将其统统一把抓住，扔进加『熔炉』，加入我的标签素材库吧！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oa239f1df94f62367bda9815ff087299d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"灰薪王","author_id":"","book_id":"7611010666932997182","book_name":"无限求生：我能手搓动漫老婆","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3803人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7611512334548206142","read_count":"3803","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"137719"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"52","tags":"动漫衍生,末日求生,综漫,多女主,二次元,无限流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oa239f1df94f62367bda9815ff087299d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435713&x-signature=06VVyE1mhyXumogN9bOu6cUflyI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2907579933011607","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"68"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315415361A0A00C17D65D867591"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":7315,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10293,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":159},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1774034597,"author_reply_time":1774034725,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618826313081717566","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"纯纯的水文，也就炼制角色这点比较吸引人，但是更新慢又水。
作为作者写的第一本小说其实还算可以，就是那股恨不得把工作每一个步骤都水上一遍的劲，颇为无趣，一天四千字一看内容就那点东西……
虽然说免费小说不在意水文，但是有没有一种可能，你一天才更新多少？跳过水文的内容又剩多少？
推荐等作者更新到五十万字以上再阅读，太寸止了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773900162,"group_id":"7611010666932997182","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不看男同、女频、纯搞笑玩梗小说","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+AshFFElDghYv6BUDDQlbmsy+E/JYKwoYeg+p8UFTy5","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0b1ec9d5250e47bc87f609deede33574~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789925&x-signature=zbdeJgP4LhLzLOmrQSF8milC8Wo%3D","user_id":"1278107176671536","user_name":"乡下来的不知名土狗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1278107176671536","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7611010666932997182","book_info":{"abstract":"【荒野求生+手搓后宫+升级打怪+角色养成+悠闲种田+秘境穿梭】
